summary: Comprehensive testing of Multi-Agent AI System for Gene Mutation Detection completed. All 7 agents working correctly, full analysis pipeline functional, Gemini AI integration successful.

ui_bugs.issue: Hidden file input not accessible via drag-and-drop area click
ui_bugs.workaround: Load Sample Sequence button works perfectly as alternative

issues: Minor React hydration warning in AI Explanation tab - nested div in p tag

passed_tests: API Health Check - All endpoints responding correctly
Reference Genes Endpoint - TP53 gene available
File Upload API - Backend file processing working
Validation Agent - Correctly rejects invalid sequences
Full Analysis Pipeline - All 7 agents working (100% success rate)
Gemini AI Integration - Successfully generating explanations
ClinVar RAG Retrieval - Evidence retrieval working
Frontend Page Load - All UI components render correctly
Load Sample Sequence - Button loads 1269 character sequence
Analysis Execution - Progress indicator and results display
Results Tabs - All 5 tabs (Overview, Mutations, Alignment, Evidence, AI Interpretation) functional
Mutation Map Visualization - Visual representation working
Alignment Viewer - Sequence alignment display working
Classification Display - Risk badges and mutation counts accurate
AI Explanation Generation - Gemini 3 Flash providing clinical interpretations

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 7 API endpoints and agents working
success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All core functionality working, minor file upload UI issue
